# castai_enterprise_service_account (Resource)

CAST AI Enterprise Service Account resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "castai_enterprise_service_account" "example" {
  enterprise_id   = "3e81b0c1-ea70-4513-8c11-60260fa04fba"
  organization_id = "3e81b0c1-ea70-4513-8c11-60260fa04fba"
  name            = "example-service-account"
  description     = "Service account managed by Terraform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enterprise_id` (String) Enterprise organization ID.
- `name` (String) Service account name.
- `organization_id` (String) Target organization ID where the service account is created.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Service account description.

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) Auto-generated service account email (read-only).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
